title: upgrades pattern
description: This mod complicates the game a bit and adds new functionality for the blacksmith's table (but to create a stone pickaxe you will have to look for a blacksmith's table)
body:
mod adds new upgrate templates stone iron gold diamond

![Stone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/65e5e1485c76cddb55bc47543138946456bca450.png)![Iron](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/06820d27bf3b4ff591195dfec98ec82133e3edab.png)![Gold](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ee43745154d2a8d3046a513ac0b718bdc30fa2c0.png)![Diamond](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1cc64a04665a39e34648463f378b702eea4030e9.png)

The modification changes the vanilla crafting of items on the blacksmith table. tools and armor changed.

tools 
wooden → stone
stone → iron
iron → golden
golden → iron

armor
leather → chain
chain → iron
iron → golden
golden → diamond
